company: Appalachian Power Company and Wheeling Power Company

source_note: Commission Order in the annual Expanded Net Energy Cost (ENEC) review of Appalachian Power Company and Wheeling Power Company, West Virginia PSC Case No. 25-0413-E-ENEC, entered September 4, 2025 — continuing the current ENEC rate and deferring treatment of the under-recovery to the securitization case (25-0310-E-PC); the companies had proposed a $71.6 million ENEC increase. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: WV PSC WebDocket, document CaseActivityID 648122 (case activities list: psc.state.wv.us/scripts/WebDocket/tblCaseActivitiesList.cfm?CaseID=84794).
